input: My product is a CLI tool for AI agents that automates deployment. Generate social posts and ad copy.
rubric: Output includes LinkedIn post with hook, story, and CTA
Output includes Twitter thread with 3+ tweets
Output includes ad headline under 40 chars
Output includes ad body under 125 chars
Output CTA present in all pieces
Brand voice consistent across all formats
description: Multi-format generation for a CLI tool

input: We built a B2B SaaS for HR teams. Generate a video script and carousel outline.
rubric: Video script has hook in first 2s
Carousel has 5+ slides with one idea each
Last carousel slide is a CTA
Script shows product-specific features, not generic
